headline: Higher Airfares Are Sticking After Spring Price Hikes, Analyst Says
summary: BofA turns bullish on U.S. airlines ahead of Q2 earnings, raising price targets on strong demand and stable summer fares. Read more.

headline: Southwest Airlines Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Southwest Airlines is slated to announce its fiscal second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts expect the company to deliver modest double-digit earnings growth.
